locator.quote: Phase 13 fixed the labels (added direction labels). NULL.

text: The arc: phase 13 fixed labels (NULL), phase 14 fixed the head's output structure, phase 15 fixed the input pathway — the load-bearing fix.

locator.quote: pathway, fix the input pathway directly. Don't increase head

text: Lesson: when a bottleneck is suspected to be an input pathway, fix the input pathway directly — don't increase head capacity, training time, or sweep hyperparameters.

locator.quote: Phase 14 changed three things at once (head architecture,

text: Single-knob discipline: phase 14 changed three things at once so it couldn't attribute lift; phase 15 changes one thing for clean attribution.
